system.damage: spears d8 (close, thrown) or slings d6 (near)

selected: to survive at the expense of others

system.moves:
- Prepare a deception, to lure travelers from the roads
- Spring an ambush when their prey takes the bait
- Take captives or slit throats, so that no one escapes to tell tales
- Flee into the grass if things go south

The magic of the Roads and the open ter- rain make a life of banditry far from easy, but somehow, they crop up every few years. Might be Hillfolk, disgraced or desperate, but more often than not, they’re scoundrels who’d rather bleed their fellows than scrape by up in Gordin’s Delve.
